    databases/postgresql-libpqxx: Convert to CMake and modernize

    * Switch to CMake as it cleans up Makefile, builds faster and adds
      .cmake files to port
    * Modernize port Makefile
    * Remove ancient CONFLICTS entry

    PR:             281022
    Approved by:    pgsql (girgen)
